user.description: Set up Apollo mmWave. The integration serves its own cards and dashboard strategy — no separate downloads.

data.auto_create_view: Add an 'Apollo mmWave' dashboard to the sidebar

data_description.auto_create_view: Adds a dashboard with a tuning + zone-mapping tab for each detected Apollo mmWave device. Turn this off if you prefer to place the cards on your own dashboards; you can change it later in the integration options.

Registers an 'Apollo mmWave' dashboard in your sidebar with a tab per device. Takes effect immediately. Turn this off if you prefer to lay out the cards yourself; the cards and strategy are still available to add manually.
data_description.dashboard_devices: Leave empty to detect Apollo mmWave devices automatically (online devices only). Select devices to show exactly those on the dashboard — including ones that are currently offline or unplugged.
